commands.name: Headless CPU playground smoke
commands.command: cargo run -p alife_tools --bin p35_playground -- run-headless crates/alife_world/tests/fixtures/p34

commands.name: Full headless example suite
commands.command: cargo run -p alife_tools --bin p35_playground -- run-all crates/alife_world/tests/fixtures/p34 examples/p35/playground_manifest.json

commands.name: Semantic fake-provider demo
commands.command: cargo run -p alife_tools --features semantic-demo --bin p35_playground -- semantic-demo

commands.name: GPU hardware diagnostics
commands.command: ALIFE_GPU_RUNTIME_BACKEND=static ALIFE_GPU_RUNTIME_FEATURE=1 ALIFE_GPU_RUNTIME_AVAILABLE=1 ALIFE_GPU_RUNTIME_VALIDATED=1 cargo run -p alife_tools --bin benchmark_tiers -- --gpu-runtime
